theme: lagoon fishery sets weekly quotas for five years
title: Lagoon Quotas: Pulsing Through the Depensation Dip
strategies: flat baseline: a tiny constant quota (1.2% of the initial stock) every legally open week, never adapting to stock or regime
steady-state MSY heuristic: estimate today's surplus production at S0 and harvest a constant fraction of it for all 260 weeks, ignoring the printed drought regime window

pulse-fishing policy search: voluntarily close during the legal season AND the printed low-recruitment regime window, and outside those windows alternate short near-ceiling bursts (while stock is safely above the Allee threshold) with short closures that let depensation-limited growth compound, searched over a small family of (burst length, rest length, burst size, safety margin) cycles
